channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19461] sanity-sec test_75a: server thread hung
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for emoly <emoly@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/ef4c1339-12ca-45e0-8b70-c8b67417fe95

test_75a failed with the following error:

Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/117287 - 5.15.0-142-generic
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/117287 - 4.18.0-553.76.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

The mds logs showed "mdt00_003: service thread pid 1445473 was inactive for 42.424 seconds".

[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025] Lustre: mdt00_003: service thread pid 1445473 was inactive for 42.424 seconds. The thread might be hung, or it might only be slow and will resume later. Dumping the stack trace for debugging purposes:
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025] task:mdt00_003       state:I stack:0     pid:1445473 ppid:2      flags:0x80004080
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025] Call Trace:
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  __schedule+0x2d1/0x870
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  schedule+0x55/0xf0
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  schedule_timeout+0x19f/0x320
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? __next_timer_interrupt+0xf0/0xf0
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  wait_woken+0x50/0x60
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ptlrpc_set_wait+0x2f5/0x7c0 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? do_wait_intr_irq+0xa0/0xa0
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? ldlm_work_revoke_ast_lock+0x1b0/0x1b0 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ldlm_run_ast_work+0xdd/0x380 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ldlm_handle_conflict_lock+0x6d/0x310 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ldlm_lock_enqueue+0x291/0x8f0 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ldlm_cli_enqueue_local+0x631/0x980 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? ldlm_cli_cancel_local+0x490/0x490 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? obd_connect.constprop.87+0x340/0x340 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_object_pdo_lock+0x33a/0x690 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? obd_connect.constprop.87+0x340/0x340 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? ldlm_cli_cancel_local+0x490/0x490 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_parent_lock+0x7b/0x2b0 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_reint_link+0x571/0xbf0 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_reint_rec+0x123/0x270 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_reint_internal+0x4d2/0x980 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  mdt_reint+0x5d/0x110 [mdt]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  tgt_request_handle+0x401/0x1d20 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x2ca/0xd70 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? lprocfs_counter_add+0x117/0x180 [obdclass]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ptlrpc_main+0xbc2/0x1490 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? __schedule+0x2d9/0x870
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0x5b0/0x5b0 [ptlrpc]
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  kthread+0x134/0x150
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ? set_kthread_struct+0x50/0x50
[Fri Oct 10 09:56:09 2025]  ret_from_fork+0x35/0x40

This issue occurred 33 times during last 3 months.

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-sec test_75a - Timeout occurred after 451 minutes, last suite running was sanity-sec

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
